description: Style Note These numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt. Product Details Round toe, black and maroon shoe with lace up styling upper Synthetic upper with reinforced overlay and a pull loop at the heel collar Padded collar and tongue with a removable, padded sockliner PU midsole TPU outsole with horizontal herringbone grooves Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush Do not store in direct sunlight
